-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:1
-msgid "Nightly CI Test"
-msgstr "Nightly CI 测试"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:3
-msgid ""
-"This document explains how to trigger nightly hardware CI tests against your"
-" own PR code on Ascend NPU hardware (A2/A3), without waiting for the "
-"scheduled nightly run."
-msgstr ""
-"本文档说明如何在 Ascend NPU 硬件（A2/A3）上针对您自己的 PR 代码触发 nightly 硬件 CI 测试，而无需等待计划中的 "
-"nightly 定时运行。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:6
-msgid "Background"
-msgstr "背景"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:8
-msgid ""
-"By default, nightly CI tests run on a fixed schedule using pre-built nightly"
-" images. Contributors can self-service trigger these tests directly against "
-"their PR changes by combining a GitHub label with a comment command."
-msgstr ""
-"默认情况下，nightly CI 测试使用预构建的 nightly 镜像按固定计划运行。贡献者可以通过组合 GitHub 标签和评论命令，直接针对其 "
-"PR 变更自助触发这些测试。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:12
-msgid "How to Trigger"
-msgstr "如何触发"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:14
-msgid "1. Post a comment"
-msgstr "1.发布评论"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:16
-msgid ""
-"Post one of the following comments in the PR to specify which tests to run. "
-"The comment itself triggers the workflow — no label is required."
-msgstr "在 PR 中发布以下评论之一，以指定要运行的测试。评论本身即可触发工作流——无需添加标签。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "Comment"
-msgstr "评论"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "Effect"
-msgstr "效果"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "`/nightly`"
-msgstr "`/nightly`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "Run **all** nightly tests"
-msgstr "运行**所有** nightly 测试"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "`/nightly all`"
-msgstr "`/nightly all`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "Run **all** nightly tests (same as above)"
-msgstr "运行**所有** nightly 测试（与上同）"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "`/nightly test1 test2 ...`"
-msgstr "`/nightly test1 test2 ...`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md
-msgid "Run only the **named** tests"
-msgstr "仅运行**指定名称**的测试"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:26
-msgid ""
-"Only repository **Contributors** (Triage role) and **Maintainers** (Write "
-"role) can trigger the `/nightly` command. If you do not have this "
-"permission, ask a maintainer to post the comment for you. You can find the "
-"list of maintainers and contributors in the project's "
-"[Governance](../../community/governance.md) page or by checking the "
-"[CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-"
-"ascend/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS) file."
-msgstr ""
-"只有仓库的**贡献者**（Triage 角色）和**维护者**（Write 角色）可以触发 `/nightly` "
-"命令。如果您没有此权限，请让维护者为您发布评论。您可以在项目的[治理](../../community/governance.md)页面或通过查看 "
-"[CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-"
-"ascend/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS) 文件找到维护者和贡献者列表。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:34
-msgid "2. Wait for results"
-msgstr "2.等待结果"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:36
-msgid ""
-"GitHub Actions will trigger the `Nightly-A2` or `Nightly-A3` workflow. Only "
-"tests matching the filter will be dispatched, which saves hardware "
-"resources."
-msgstr ""
-"GitHub Actions 将触发 `Nightly-A2` 或 `Nightly-A3` "
-"工作流。只有与筛选条件匹配的测试会被分发，从而节省硬件资源。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:39
-msgid "Differences Between PR and Scheduled Runs"
-msgstr "PR 触发与定时运行的区别"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Scheduled / Manual Dispatch"
-msgstr "定时/手动触发"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "PR-triggered"
-msgstr "PR 触发"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Trigger"
-msgstr "触发方式"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Cron (daily) or `workflow_dispatch`"
-msgstr "Cron（每日）或 `workflow_dispatch`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "`/nightly` comment"
-msgstr "`/nightly` 评论"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Code tested"
-msgstr "测试的代码"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Pre-built nightly image"
-msgstr "预构建的 nightly 镜像"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Your PR's HEAD commit (source installed fresh)"
-msgstr "您的 PR 的 HEAD 提交（从源码全新安装）"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Test scope"
-msgstr "测试范围"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "All tests"
-msgstr "所有测试"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Configurable via `/nightly <names>`"
-msgstr "可通过 `/nightly <名称>` 配置"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "vLLM + vllm-ascend"
-msgstr "vLLM + vllm-ascend"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "From image"
-msgstr "来自镜像"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Checked out and installed from source"
-msgstr "从源码检出并安装"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "Test matrix"
-msgstr "测试矩阵"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "From main branch's matrix YAML"
-msgstr "来自主分支的矩阵 YAML"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:25
-msgid "From PR branch's matrix YAML"
-msgstr "来自 PR 分支的矩阵 YAML"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:49
-msgid ""
-"When a PR run is detected (`is_pr_test: true`), the workflow additionally:"
-msgstr "当检测到 PR 运行时（`is_pr_test: true`），工作流还会执行以下额外步骤："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:51
-msgid "Uninstalls any existing vllm packages in the container."
-msgstr "卸载容器中任何已有的 vllm 包。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:52
-msgid ""
-"Checks out the specific vllm version and your PR's vllm-ascend commit from "
-"source."
-msgstr "从源码检出特定的 vllm 版本以及您 PR 中的 vllm-ascend 提交。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:53
-msgid "Installs all dependencies from source."
-msgstr "从源码安装所有依赖。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:54
-msgid "Installs the `aisbench` benchmark suite."
-msgstr "安装 `aisbench` 基准测试套件。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:56
-msgid "Test Matrix Data Source"
-msgstr "测试矩阵数据源"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:58
-msgid ""
-"The set of nightly test cases (their names, runners, test paths, model "
-"configs) is declared in a single data file:"
-msgstr "nightly 测试用例集（包括名称、运行器、测试路径、模型配置）在单个数据文件中声明："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:65
-msgid ""
-"The file is organized as `a2:` and `a3:` top-level keys (one per SoC). Under"
-" each SoC, tests are grouped by execution shape (single-node, multi-node, "
-"double-node, multi-card, accuracy) and each group holds a `test_config` (or "
-"`nightly` / `pr_only` for accuracy) list whose entries carry a `name` plus "
-"the fields consumed by the downstream reusable workflows (`os`, `tests`, "
-"`config_file_path`, `size`, etc.)."
-msgstr ""
-"该文件以 `a2:` 和 `a3:` 作为顶级键组织（每个 SoC 一个）。在每个 SoC "
-"下，测试按执行形态分组（单节点、多节点、双节点、多卡、精度），每个组包含一个 `test_config`（或精度组的 `nightly` / "
-"`pr_only`）列表，其条目包含 `name` "
-"以及下游可复用工作流所需的字段（`os`、`tests`、`config_file_path`、`size` 等）。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:71
-msgid ""
-"Both the `Nightly-A2` and `Nightly-A3` workflows dynamically read this file "
-"at run time — there is no hardcoded test matrix in the workflow YAMLs. The "
-"`/nightly <name>` slash command resolves names by walking the same file from"
-" the PR branch, so newly added entries can be exercised on a PR before they "
-"land on main."
-msgstr ""
-"`Nightly-A2` 和 `Nightly-A3` 工作流均在运行时动态读取此文件——工作流 YAML 中没有硬编码的测试矩阵。`/nightly "
-"<name>` 斜杠命令通过遍历 PR 分支上的同一文件来解析名称，因此新添加的条目可以在合并到主分支之前在 PR 上进行验证。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:77
-msgid "Adding a New Nightly Test Case"
-msgstr "添加新的 Nightly 测试用例"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:79
-msgid "To add a new test case (no need to touch the workflow YAMLs):"
-msgstr "要添加新的测试用例（无需修改工作流 YAML）："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:81
-msgid ""
-"Append an entry under the appropriate section in "
-"`.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`. Each entry needs at least:"
-msgstr ""
-"在 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` 的相应部分下追加一个条目。每个条目至少需要："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:83
-msgid "`name`: unique identifier used in `/nightly <name>` filters"
-msgstr "`name`：在 `/nightly <name>` 筛选器中使用的唯一标识符"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:84
-msgid ""
-"`os` (for single-node / multi-card pytest+yaml tests) or `runner` is "
-"inferred"
-msgstr "`os`（用于单节点/多卡 pytest+yaml 测试）或自动推断的 `runner`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:85
-msgid ""
-"one of `tests:` (pytest directory) or `config_file_path:` (YAML-driven model"
-" config)"

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:188
-msgid ""
-"The A3 resource pool has a maximum concurrency of **5×16 NPUs**. Multi-node "
-"tests run with `max-parallel: 2` to avoid resource exhaustion. Running "
-"`/nightly all` on A3 will queue a large number of jobs — prefer targeting "
-"specific test names when possible."
-msgstr ""
-"A3 资源池的最大并发度为 **5×16 NPU**。多节点测试以 `max-parallel: 2` 运行，以避免资源耗尽。在 A3 上运行 "
-"`/nightly all` 会使大量任务排队——请尽可能优先指定具体的测试名称。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:194
-msgid "Examples"
-msgstr "示例"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:196
-msgid "Run all available nightly tests against your PR:"
-msgstr "针对您的 PR 运行所有可用的 nightly 测试："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:202
-msgid "Run only the custom operator multi-card test:"
-msgstr "仅运行自定义算子多卡测试："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:208
-msgid "Run two specific tests at once (one per SoC):"
-msgstr "同时运行两个指定的测试（每个 SoC 一个）："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:214
-msgid "Run a single accuracy group (with all of its models):"
-msgstr "运行单个精度组（包含其所有模型）："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:220
-msgid "Run a single accuracy model (only that model from a group):"
-msgstr "运行单个精度模型（仅运行组中的该模型）："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:226
-msgid ""
-"Re-trigger after fixing an issue: just push a new commit. The `synchronize` "
-"event re-runs the workflow and picks up the existing `/nightly` comment "
-"automatically — no need to post a new comment."
-msgstr ""
-"修复问题后重新触发：只需推送一个新的提交。`synchronize` 事件会重新运行工作流并自动获取现有的 `/nightly` "
-"评论——无需发布新评论。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:230
-msgid "Adding a New Test Case — Worked Example"
-msgstr "添加新测试用例——操作示例"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:232
-msgid "To add `my-new-test` to the A2 single-node section:"
-msgstr "要将 `my-new-test` 添加到 A2 单节点部分："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:234
-msgid ""
-"Edit `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`, append under "
-"`a2.single_node.test_config`:"
-msgstr ""
-"编辑 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`，在 "
-"`a2.single_node.test_config` 下追加："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:243
-msgid "Commit the new pytest file (`test_my_new.py`) in the same PR."
-msgstr "在同一个 PR 中提交新的 pytest 文件（`test_my_new.py`）。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:245
-msgid "Trigger from the PR:"
-msgstr "从 PR 触发："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:251
-msgid "The workflow will:"
-msgstr "工作流将："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:253
-msgid ""
-"`pr_nightly_command.yml` reads your PR's `nightly_config.yaml` and resolves "
-"`my-new-test` → dispatch A2 only."
-msgstr ""
-"`pr_nightly_command.yml` 读取您的 PR 的 `nightly_config.yaml`，并将 `my-new-test` "
-"解析为仅调度 A2。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:255
-msgid ""
-"`Nightly-A2` is dispatched at `main`, but `generate-a2-matrix` checks out "
-"your PR commit and reads the new entry from the matrix."
-msgstr ""
-"`Nightly-A2` 在 `main` 分支上被调度，但 `generate-a2-matrix` 会检出您的 PR 提交并从矩阵中读取新条目。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:257
-msgid ""
-"`single-node-tests` runs one matrix job for `my-new-test`, with "
-"`should_run=true`. The reusable workflow checks out your PR code (via "
-"`vllm_ascend_ref`) and runs your pytest."
-msgstr ""
-"`single-node-tests` 为 `my-new-test` 运行一个矩阵任务，`should_run=true`。可复用工作流（通过 "
-"`vllm_ascend_ref`）检出您的 PR 代码并运行您的 pytest。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:261
-msgid "Troubleshooting"
-msgstr "故障排查"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:263
-msgid "**The workflow didn't start after I posted the comment.**"
-msgstr "**发布评论后工作流未启动。**"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:265
-msgid ""
-"Check that the comment starts exactly with `/nightly` with no leading spaces"
-" or extra characters before the slash."
-msgstr "检查评论是否以 `/nightly` 精确开头，斜杠前没有前导空格或多余字符。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:267
-msgid ""
-"Confirm you have at least Triage permission on the repository; unauthorized "
-"users' comments are ignored."
-msgstr "确认您至少拥有仓库的 Triage 权限；未授权用户的评论将被忽略。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:269
-msgid ""
-"To re-trigger after fixing an issue, simply push a new commit — the workflow"
-" will reuse the existing `/nightly` comment automatically."
-msgstr "修复问题后重新触发，只需推送一个新的提交——工作流会自动重用现有的 `/nightly` 评论。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:272
-msgid "**Only some tests ran, not the ones I expected.**"
-msgstr "**只运行了部分测试，不是预期的那些。**"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:274
-msgid ""
-"Test names are case-sensitive and must match the `name` field in "
-"`.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` exactly (see the tables "
-"above)."
-msgstr ""
-"测试名称区分大小写，并且必须与 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` 中的 `name` "
-"字段完全一致（参见上表）。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:276
-msgid ""
-"For a PR-triggered run, the matrix is loaded from your PR's  "
-"`nightly_config.yaml`, not main. If a name isn't in your PR's file, it won't"
-" be recognized and the dispatch will be skipped."
-msgstr ""
-"对于 PR 触发的运行，矩阵从您的 PR 的 `nightly_config.yaml` 加载，而不是 main 分支。如果名称不在您的 PR "
-"文件中，它将不会被识别，调度将被跳过。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:279
-msgid ""
-"Check the `parse-trigger` job output in GitHub Actions for the resolved "
-"`test_filter` value."
-msgstr "在 GitHub Actions 中检查 `parse-trigger` 任务的输出，查看解析后的 `test_filter` 值。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:282
-msgid "**The workflow ran with the scheduled image, not my PR code.**"
-msgstr "**工作流使用的是定时镜像，而不是我的 PR 代码。**"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:284
-msgid ""
-"Confirm the workflow was triggered by `repository_dispatch` (slash command),"
-" not bare `workflow_dispatch`. The `pr_nightly_command.yml` workflow is what"
-" actually dispatches `schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml` / `_a3.yaml` with "
-"`vllm_ascend_ref` pointing at your PR SHA."
-msgstr ""
-"确认工作流是由 `repository_dispatch`（斜杠命令）触发的，而不是裸 "
-"`workflow_dispatch`。`pr_nightly_command.yml` 工作流才是实际调度 "
-"`schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml` / `_a3.yaml` 的，其中 `vllm_ascend_ref` 指向您的 PR "
-"SHA。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:289
-msgid "**A new test I added isn't being recognized.**"
-msgstr "**我添加的新测试未被识别。**"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:291
-msgid ""
-"Confirm the entry is well-formed YAML under "
-"`.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`. The `name` field is "
-"required and must be unique within the SoC's section."
-msgstr ""
-"确认条目是格式良好的 YAML，位于 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` 下。`name` "
-"字段是必需的，并且在 SoC 部分内必须唯一。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:294
-msgid ""
-"The matrix is loaded from your PR branch, so make sure the file is committed"
-" to the same branch the `/nightly` comment was posted on."
-msgstr "矩阵从您的 PR 分支加载，因此请确保文件已提交到发布 `/nightly` 评论的同一分支。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:297
-msgid ""
-"**How to obtain more detailed logs to pinpoint problems for multi-node "
-"tests**"
-msgstr "**如何获取更详细的日志以定位多节点测试的问题**"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:299
-msgid ""
-"For most issues, the stdout pop-up logs from GitHub actions are sufficient "
-"(this log always represents the logs from the first node)."
-msgstr "对于大多数问题，GitHub Actions 的标准输出弹出日志就足够了（该日志始终代表第一个节点的日志）。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/contribution/nightly_ci_test.md:300
-msgid ""
-"If the logs from a first node are no longer sufficient to provide effective "
-"logging information, see the summary of your jobs to download log archive "
-"for the corresponding test, which includes the framework-side logs and plog "
-"information for each node, structured as follows:"
-msgstr ""
-"如果第一个节点的日志不再足以提供有效的日志信息，请查看任务摘要以下载对应测试的日志归档，其中包含框架侧日志和每个节点的 plog 信息，结构如下："
+"Generated-By: detect_po_changes.py\n"
 
 msgid "# Nightly CI Test"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "# 夜间CI测试"
 
 msgid ""
 "This document explains how to trigger nightly hardware CI tests against your own PR code\n"
 "on Ascend NPU hardware (A2/A3), without waiting for the scheduled nightly run."
 msgstr ""
+"本文档说明如何在Ascend NPU硬件（A2/A3）上针对您自己的PR代码触发夜间硬件CI测试，\n"
+"无需等待预定的夜间运行。"
 
 msgid "## Background"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 背景"
 
 msgid ""
 "By default, nightly CI tests run on a fixed schedule using pre-built nightly images.\n"
 "Contributors can self-service trigger these tests directly against their PR changes\n"
 "by combining a GitHub label with a comment command."
 msgstr ""
+"默认情况下，夜间CI测试使用预构建的夜间镜像按固定计划运行。\n"
+"贡献者可以通过结合GitHub标签和评论命令，自行针对其PR更改触发这些测试。"
 
 msgid "## How to Trigger"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 如何触发"
 
 msgid "### 1. Post a comment"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "### 1. 发布评论"
 
 msgid ""
 "Post one of the following comments in the PR to specify which tests to run.\n"
 "The comment itself triggers the workflow — no label is required."
 msgstr ""
+"在PR中发布以下评论之一以指定要运行的测试。\n"
+"评论本身即可触发工作流——无需标签。"
 
 msgid ""
 "| Comment | Effect |\n"
 "|---------|--------|\n"
 "| `/nightly` | Run **all** nightly tests |\n"
 "| `/nightly all` | Run **all** nightly tests (same as above) |\n"
-"| `/nightly test1 test2 ...` | Run only the **named** tests |"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "!!! note"
+"| `/nightly test1 test2 ...` | Run only the **named** tests |\n"
+"| `/nightly <tests> --aop_enabled` | Run named tests with AOP bisect / classify enabled |"
 msgstr ""
+"| 评论 | 效果 |\n"
+"|---------|--------|\n"
+"| `/nightly` | 运行**所有**夜间测试 |\n"
+"| `/nightly all` | 运行**所有**夜间测试（同上） |\n"
+"| `/nightly test1 test2 ...` | 仅运行**指定名称**的测试 |\n"
+"| `/nightly <tests> --aop_enabled` | 运行指定测试并启用AOP二分/分类 |"
 
 msgid ""
 "Only repository **Contributors** (Triage role) and **Maintainers** (Write role) can\n"
@@ -982,17 +75,25 @@ msgid ""
 "    [CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS)\n"
 "    file."
 msgstr ""
+"只有仓库的**贡献者**（Triage角色）和**维护者**（Write角色）才能\n"
+"    触发`/nightly`命令。如果您没有此权限，请让维护者\n"
+"    为您发布评论。您可以在项目的\n"
+"    [治理](../../community/governance.md)页面或通过查看\n"
+"    [CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS)\n"
+"    文件找到维护者和贡献者列表。"
 
 msgid "### 2. Wait for results"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "### 2. 等待结果"
 
 msgid ""
 "GitHub Actions will trigger the `Nightly-A2` or `Nightly-A3` workflow. Only tests\n"
 "matching the filter will be dispatched, which saves hardware resources."
 msgstr ""
+"GitHub Actions将触发`Nightly-A2`或`Nightly-A3`工作流。仅会调度\n"
+"与过滤器匹配的测试，从而节省硬件资源。"
 
 msgid "## Differences Between PR and Scheduled Runs"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## PR运行与计划运行的区别"
 
 msgid ""
 "| | Scheduled / Manual Dispatch | PR-triggered |\n"
@@ -1003,21 +104,38 @@ msgid ""
 "| vLLM + vllm-ascend | From image | Checked out and installed from source |\n"
 "| Test matrix | From main branch's matrix YAML | From PR branch's matrix YAML |"
 msgstr ""
+"| | 计划/手动调度 | PR触发 |\n"
+"|---|----------------------------|---|\n"
+"| 触发方式 | Cron（每日）或`workflow_dispatch` | `/nightly`评论 |\n"
+"| 测试代码 | 预构建的夜间镜像 | 您PR的HEAD提交（全新安装的源码） |\n"
+"| 测试范围 | 所有测试 | 可通过`/nightly <names>`配置 |\n"
+"| vLLM + vllm-ascend | 来自镜像 | 从源码检出并安装 |\n"
+"| 测试矩阵 | 来自主分支的矩阵YAML | 来自PR分支的矩阵YAML |"
+
+msgid ""
+"When a PR run is detected (`is_pr_test: true`), the workflow additionally:"
+msgstr "当检测到PR运行时（`is_pr_test: true`），工作流还会额外执行："
 
 msgid ""
 "1. Uninstalls any existing vllm packages in the container.\n"
 "2. Checks out the specific vllm version and your PR's vllm-ascend commit from source.\n"
 "3. Installs all dependencies from source.\n"
 "4. Installs the `aisbench` benchmark suite."
 msgstr ""
+"1. 卸载容器中所有现有的vllm包。\n"
+"2. 从源码检出特定的vllm版本和您PR的vllm-ascend提交。\n"
+"3. 从源码安装所有依赖。\n"
+"4. 安装`aisbench`基准测试套件。"
 
 msgid "## Test Matrix Data Source"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 测试矩阵数据源"
 
 msgid ""
 "The set of nightly test cases (their names, runners, test paths, model configs) is\n"
 "declared in a single data file:"
 msgstr ""
+"夜间测试用例集（其名称、运行器、测试路径、模型配置）\n"
+"在单个数据文件中声明："
 
 msgid ""
 "The file is organized as `a2:` and `a3:` top-level keys (one per SoC). Under each\n"
@@ -1026,6 +144,11 @@ msgid ""
 "for accuracy) list whose entries carry a `name` plus the fields consumed by the\n"
 "downstream reusable workflows (`os`, `tests`, `config_file_path`, `size`, etc.)."
 msgstr ""
+"该文件以`a2:`和`a3:`作为顶层键组织（每个SoC一个）。在每个\n"
+"SoC下，测试按执行形态分组（单节点、多节点、双节点、\n"
+"多卡、精度），每个组包含一个`test_config`（或精度相关的`nightly` / `pr_only`）\n"
+"列表，其条目包含`name`以及下游可复用工作流\n"
+"使用的字段（`os`、`tests`、`config_file_path`、`size`等）。"
 
 msgid ""
 "Both the `Nightly-A2` and `Nightly-A3` workflows dynamically read this file at run\n"
@@ -1034,9 +157,16 @@ msgid ""
 "PR branch, so newly added entries can be exercised on a PR before they land on\n"
 "main."
 msgstr ""
+"`Nightly-A2`和`Nightly-A3`工作流都在运行时动态读取此文件\n"
+"——工作流YAML中没有硬编码的测试矩阵。\n"
+"`/nightly <name>`斜杠命令通过遍历PR分支上的同一文件来解析名称，\n"
+"因此新添加的条目可以在合并到主分支之前在PR上进行验证。"
 
 msgid "## Adding a New Nightly Test Case"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 添加新的夜间测试用例"
+
+msgid "To add a new test case (no need to touch the workflow YAMLs):"
+msgstr "要添加新的测试用例（无需修改工作流YAML）："
 
 msgid ""
 "1. Append an entry under the appropriate section in\n"
@@ -1050,18 +180,33 @@ msgid ""
 "3. Open a PR. Once CI is green, you can validate the new entry against real NPU\n"
 "   hardware **without** merging the PR — see *Examples* below."
 msgstr ""
+"1. 在`.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`的相应部分下追加一个条目。每个条目至少需要：\n"
+"   - `name`：在`/nightly <name>`过滤器中使用的唯一标识符\n"
+"   - `os`（用于单节点/多卡pytest+yaml测试）或推断出的`runner`\n"
+"   - `tests:`（pytest目录）或`config_file_path:`（YAML驱动的模型配置）之一\n"
+"   - `size`（仅多节点/双节点）\n"
+"2. 添加实际的测试文件（`tests/e2e/nightly/...`下的pytest模块或\n"
+"   `tests/e2e/nightly/.../configs/`中的YAML模型配置）。\n"
+"3. 打开一个PR。一旦CI通过，您可以在**不**合并PR的情况下，针对真实的NPU\n"
+"   硬件验证新条目——请参阅下面的*示例*。"
 
 msgid "## Available Test Names"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 可用的测试名称"
 
 msgid ""
 "The test names you can pass to `/nightly` correspond to the `name` fields under\n"
 "the matching section in `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`. The\n"
 "tables below mirror the current contents of that file."
 msgstr ""
+"您可以传递给`/nightly`的测试名称对应于\n"
+"`.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`中匹配部分的`name`字段。\n"
+"下表反映了该文件的当前内容。"
 
 msgid "### A2 workflow (`.github/workflows/schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml`)"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "### A2工作流（`.github/workflows/schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml`）"
+
+msgid "**Single-node tests** (`a2.single_node.test_config`):"
+msgstr "**单节点测试**（`a2.single_node.test_config`）："
 
 msgid ""
 "| Test name | Description |\n"
@@ -1072,6 +217,16 @@ msgid ""
 "| `Qwen3.5-27B-w8a8-A2` | Qwen3.5-27B W8A8 |\n"
 "| `Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-w4a8-mtp` | Qwen3.5-397B-A17B W4A8 + MTP |"
 msgstr ""
+"| 测试名称 | 描述 |\n"
+"|-----------|-------------|\n"
+"| `test_custom_op_multi_card` | 自定义算子测试（多卡） |\n"
+"| `qwen3-vl-32b-instruct-w8a8` | Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct W8A8 |\n"
+"| `qwen3-32b-int8` | Qwen3-32B INT8量化 |\n"
+"| `Qwen3.5-27B-w8a8-A2` | Qwen3.5-27B W8A8 |\n"
+"| `Qwen3.5-397B-A17B-w4a8-mtp` | Qwen3.5-397B-A17B W4A8 + MTP |"
+
+msgid "**Multi-node tests** (`a2.multi_node.test_config`):"
+msgstr "**多节点测试**（`a2.multi_node.test_config`）："
 
 msgid ""
 "| Test name | Description |\n"
@@ -1080,6 +235,14 @@ msgid ""
 "| `multi-node-GLM-5.1-w8a8-A2` | GLM-5.1 W8A8, 2 nodes |\n"
 "| `multi-node-Kimi-K2.5-W4A8-A2` | Kimi-K2.5 W4A8, 2 nodes |"
 msgstr ""
+"| 测试名称 | 描述 |\n"
+"|-----------|-------------|\n"
+"| `multi-node-qwen3-235b-dp` | Qwen3-235B-A22B，2节点DP |\n"
+"| `multi-node-GLM-5.1-w8a8-A2` | GLM-5.1 W8A8，2节点 |\n"
+"| `multi-node-Kimi-K2.5-W4A8-A2` | Kimi-K2.5 W4A8，2节点 |"
+
+msgid "**Accuracy tests** (`a2.accuracy.nightly` and `a2.accuracy.pr_only`):"
+msgstr "**精度测试**（`a2.accuracy.nightly`和`a2.accuracy.pr_only`）："
 
 msgid ""
 "| Test name | Description | Scope |\n"
@@ -1091,20 +254,41 @@ msgid ""
 "| `pr-accuracy-group-1` | gemma-3-4b-it, internlm3-8b-instruct, etc. | pr_only |\n"
 "| `pr-accuracy-group-2` | Qwen2.5-Math-RM-72B, Hunyuan-A13B-Instruct | pr_only |"
 msgstr ""
+"| 测试名称 | 描述 | 范围 |\n"
+"|-----------|-------------|-------|\n"

 msgid ""
 "The A3 resource pool has a maximum concurrency of **5×16 NPUs**. Multi-node tests\n"
 "    run with `max-parallel: 2` to avoid resource exhaustion. Running `/nightly all` on\n"
 "    A3 will queue a large number of jobs — prefer targeting specific test names when\n"
 "    possible."
 msgstr ""
+"A3 资源池的最大并发度为 **5×16 NPU**。多节点测试\n"
+"    以 `max-parallel: 2` 运行，以避免资源耗尽。在 A3 上运行 `/nightly all`\n"
+"    会排队大量任务——尽可能优先指定具体的测试名称。"
 
 msgid "## Examples"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 示例"
+
+msgid "Run all available nightly tests against your PR:"
+msgstr "针对你的 PR 运行所有可用的 nightly 测试："
+
+msgid "Run only the custom operator multi-card test:"
+msgstr "仅运行自定义算子多卡测试："
+
+msgid "Run two specific tests at once (one per SoC):"
+msgstr "同时运行两个特定测试（每个 SoC 一个）："
+
+msgid "Run a single accuracy group (with all of its models):"
+msgstr "运行单个精度组（包含其所有模型）："
+
+msgid "Run a single accuracy model (only that model from a group):"
+msgstr "运行单个精度模型（仅组中的该模型）："
 
 msgid ""
 "Re-trigger after fixing an issue: just push a new commit. The `synchronize` event\n"
 "re-runs the workflow and picks up the existing `/nightly` comment automatically — no\n"
 "need to post a new comment."
 msgstr ""
+"修复问题后重新触发：只需推送一个新提交。`synchronize` 事件\n"
+"会重新运行工作流并自动拾取现有的 `/nightly` 评论——无需\n"
+"发布新评论。"
 
-msgid "## Adding a New Test Case — Worked Example"
+msgid "## AOP Hooks (Bisect)"
+msgstr "## AOP 钩子（二分定位）"
+
+msgid ""
+"Add `--aop_enabled` to any `/nightly` command to enable the AOP pipeline:"
+msgstr "在任何 `/nightly` 命令中添加 `--aop_enabled` 以启用 AOP 流水线："
+
+msgid "When enabled, the workflow will:"
+msgstr "启用后，工作流将："
+
+msgid ""
+"1. **Capture** the test result (pass / fail).\n"
+"2. **Classify** the failure as environmental (network, infra) or code-related.\n"
+"3. **Bisect** genuine code failures to pinpoint the offending commit."
 msgstr ""
+"1. **捕获** 测试结果（通过/失败）。\n"
+"2. **分类** 失败为环境相关（网络、基础设施）或代码相关。\n"
+"3. **二分定位** 真正的代码失败，以精确定位有问题的提交。"
+
+msgid ""
+"This is useful for automated root-cause analysis of nightly regressions."
+msgstr "这对于 nightly 回归的自动根因分析非常有用。"
+
+msgid "## Adding a New Test Case — Worked Example"
+msgstr "## 添加新测试用例——操作示例"
+
+msgid "To add `my-new-test` to the A2 single-node section:"
+msgstr "要将 `my-new-test` 添加到 A2 单节点部分："
 
 msgid ""
 "1. Edit `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`, append under\n"
 "   `a2.single_node.test_config`:"
 msgstr ""
+"1. 编辑 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml`，在\n"
+"   `a2.single_node.test_config` 下追加："
 
 msgid "2. Commit the new pytest file (`test_my_new.py`) in the same PR."
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "2. 在同一 PR 中提交新的 pytest 文件 (`test_my_new.py`)。"
 
 msgid "3. Trigger from the PR:"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "3. 从 PR 触发："
+
+msgid "The workflow will:"
+msgstr "工作流将："
 
 msgid ""
 "- `pr_nightly_command.yml` reads your PR's `nightly_config.yaml` and resolves\n"
@@ -1194,9 +470,19 @@ msgid ""
 "  `should_run=true`. The reusable workflow checks out your PR code (via\n"
 "  `vllm_ascend_ref`) and runs your pytest."
 msgstr ""
+"- `pr_nightly_command.yml` 读取你 PR 的 `nightly_config.yaml` 并解析\n"
+"  `my-new-test` → 仅调度 A2。\n"
+"- `Nightly-A2` 在 `main` 上调度，但 `generate-a2-matrix` 检出你的\n"
+"  PR 提交并从矩阵中读取新条目。\n"
+"- `single-node-tests` 为 `my-new-test` 运行一个矩阵任务，\n"
+"  `should_run=true`。可重用工作流检出你的 PR 代码（通过\n"
+"  `vllm_ascend_ref`）并运行你的 pytest。"
 
 msgid "## Troubleshooting"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "## 故障排除"
+
+msgid "**The workflow didn't start after I posted the comment.**"
+msgstr "**我发布评论后工作流没有启动。**"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Check that the comment starts exactly with `/nightly` with no leading spaces or\n"
@@ -1206,6 +492,12 @@ msgid ""
 "- To re-trigger after fixing an issue, simply push a new commit — the workflow will\n"
 "  reuse the existing `/nightly` comment automatically."
 msgstr ""
+"- 检查评论是否以 `/nightly` 精确开头，斜杠前没有前导空格或额外字符。\n"
+"- 确认您至少拥有仓库的 Triage 权限；未经授权用户的评论将被忽略。\n"
+"- 修复问题后如需重新触发，只需推送一个新提交——工作流将自动复用已有的 `/nightly` 评论。"
+
+msgid "**Only some tests ran, not the ones I expected.**"
+msgstr "**只运行了部分测试，并非我期望的那些。**"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Test names are case-sensitive and must match the `name` field in\n"
@@ -1216,13 +508,26 @@ msgid ""
 "- Check the `parse-trigger` job output in GitHub Actions for the resolved\n"
 "  `test_filter` value."
 msgstr ""
+"- 测试名称区分大小写，必须与 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` 中的 `name` 字段完全匹配（参见上表）。\n"
+"- 对于 PR 触发的运行，矩阵从您 PR 的 `nightly_config.yaml` 加载，而非主分支。如果某个名称不在您的 PR 文件中，它将不会被识别，调度将被跳过。\n"
+"- 在 GitHub Actions 中检查 `parse-trigger` 任务的输出，以获取解析后的 `test_filter` 值。"
+
+msgid "**The workflow ran with the scheduled image, not my PR code.**"
+msgstr "**工作流使用了定时调度的镜像运行，而非我的 PR 代码。**"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Confirm the workflow was triggered by `repository_dispatch` (slash command),\n"
 "  not bare `workflow_dispatch`. The `pr_nightly_command.yml` workflow is what\n"
 "  actually dispatches `schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml` / `_a3.yaml` with\n"
 "  `vllm_ascend_ref` pointing at your PR SHA."
 msgstr ""
+"- 确认工作流是由 `repository_dispatch`（斜杠命令）触发的，而非单纯的 "
+"`workflow_dispatch`。`pr_nightly_command.yml` 工作流才是实际调度 "
+"`schedule_nightly_test_a2.yaml` / `_a3.yaml` 的流程，其中 `vllm_ascend_ref` 指向您的 "
+"PR SHA。"
+
+msgid "**A new test I added isn't being recognized.**"
+msgstr "**我添加的新测试未被识别。**"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Confirm the entry is well-formed YAML under\n"
@@ -1231,8 +536,17 @@ msgid ""
 "- The matrix is loaded from your PR branch, so make sure the file is committed\n"
 "  to the same branch the `/nightly` comment was posted on."
 msgstr ""
+"- 确认条目在 `.github/workflows/configs/nightly_config.yaml` 中是格式良好的 YAML。`name` 字段是必需的，并且在 SoC 部分内必须唯一。\n"
+"- 矩阵从您的 PR 分支加载，因此请确保文件已提交到发布 `/nightly` 评论的同一分支。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**How to obtain more detailed logs to pinpoint problems for multi-node "
+"tests**"
+msgstr "**如何获取更详细的日志以定位多节点测试的问题**"
 
 msgid ""
 "- For most issues, the stdout pop-up logs from GitHub actions are sufficient (this log always represents the logs from the first node).\n"
 "- If the logs from a first node are no longer sufficient to provide effective logging information, see the summary of your jobs to download log archive for the corresponding test, which includes the framework-side logs and plog information for each node, structured as follows:"
 msgstr ""
+"- 对于大多数问题，GitHub Actions 的 stdout 弹出日志已足够（此日志始终代表第一个节点的日志）。\n"
+"- 如果第一个节点的日志不足以提供有效的日志信息，请查看任务摘要，下载对应测试的日志归档，其中包含每个节点的框架侧日志和 plog 信息，结构如下："

 msgid ""
-"Example: [tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py](https://github.com/vllm-"
-"project/vllm-ascend/blob/main/tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py)."
+"- The test file path should be consistent with the source file and start with the `test_` prefix, such as: `vllm_ascend/worker/worker.py` --> `tests/ut/worker/test_worker.py`\n"
+"- The vLLM Ascend test uses unittest framework. See [the Python unittest documentation](https://docs.python.org/3/library/unittest.html#module-unittest) to understand how to write unit tests.\n"
+"- All unit tests can be run on CPUs, so you must mock the device-related functions on the host.\n"
+"- Example: [tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/blob/main/tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py).\n"
+"- You can run the unit tests using `pytest`:"
 msgstr ""
-"示例：[tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-"

-msgid ""

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md:160
 msgid ""
-"`abbr`: Unique identifier for a local task, used to distinguish between "
-"multiple tasks."
-msgstr "`abbr`：本地任务的唯一标识符，用于区分多个任务。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md:161
-msgid "`path`: Update to your model weight path."
-msgstr "`path`：更新为您的模型权重路径。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md:162
-msgid "`model`: Update to your model name in vLLM."
-msgstr "`model`：更新为您的模型在 vLLM 中的名称。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md:163
-msgid "`host_ip` and `host_port`: Update to your vLLM server ip and port."
-msgstr "`host_ip` 和 `host_port`：更新为您的 vLLM 服务器的 IP 地址和端口号。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md:164
-msgid ""
-"`max_out_len`: Note `max_out_len` + LLM input length should be less than "
-"`max_model_len`(config in your vllm server), `32768` will be suitable for "
-"most datasets."
+"- `attr`: Identifier for the inference backend type, fixed as `service` (serving-based inference) or `local` (local model).\n"
+"- `type`: Used to select different backend API types.\n"
+"- `abbr`: Unique identifier for a local task, used to distinguish between multiple tasks.\n"
+"- `path`: Update to your model weight path.\n"
+"- `model`: Update to your model name in vLLM.\n"
+"- `host_ip` and `host_port`: Update to your vLLM server ip and port.\n"
+"- `max_out_len`: Note `max_out_len` + LLM input length should be less than `max_model_len`(config in your vllm server), `32768` will be suitable for most datasets.\n"
+"- `batch_size`: Update according to your dataset.\n"
+"- `temperature`: Update inference argument."
 msgstr ""
-"`max_out_len`：请注意，`max_out_len` + LLM 输入长度应小于 vLLM 服务器中配置的 "
-"`max_model_len`。`32768` 适用于大多数数据集。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/evaluation/using_ais_bench.md:165
-msgid "`batch_size`: Update according to your dataset."
-msgstr "`batch_size`：根据您的数据集进行设置。"
+"- `attr`: 推理后端类型标识符，固定为 `service`（服务化推理）或 `local`（本地模型）。\n"
+"- `type`: 用于选择不同的后端 API 类型。\n"
+"- `abbr`: 本地任务的唯一标识符，用于区分多个任务。\n"
+"- `path`: 更新为您的模型权重路径。\n"
+"- `model`: 更新为 vLLM 中的模型名称。\n"
+"- `host_ip` 和 `host_port`: 更新为您的 vLLM 服务 IP 和端口。\n"
+"- `max_out_len`: 注意 `max_out_len` + LLM 输入长度应小于 `max_model_len`（在 vLLM 服务中配置），`32768` 适用于大多数数据集。\n"
+"- `batch_size`: 根据数据集更新。\n"
+"- `temperature`: 更新推理参数。"

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:71
-msgid "1.1. jemalloc"
-msgstr "1.1.jemalloc"
+msgid "#### 1.1. jemalloc"
+msgstr "#### 1.1. jemalloc"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:73
 msgid ""
 "**jemalloc** is a memory allocator that improves performance for multi-"
 "threaded scenarios and can reduce memory fragmentation. jemalloc uses a "
 "local thread memory manager to allocate variables, which can avoid lock "
 "competition between threads and can hugely optimize performance."
 msgstr ""
 "**jemalloc** 是一种内存分配器，可提升多线程场景下的性能并减少内存碎片。jemalloc "
-"使用本地线程内存管理器来分配变量，这可以避免线程间的锁竞争，从而大幅优化性能。"
+"使用本地线程内存管理器来分配变量，从而避免线程间的锁竞争，大幅优化性能。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:85
-msgid "1.2. Tcmalloc"
-msgstr "1.2.Tcmalloc"
+msgid "#### 1.2. Tcmalloc"
+msgstr "#### 1.2. Tcmalloc"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:87
 msgid ""
 "**TCMalloc (Thread Caching Malloc)** is a universal memory allocator that "
 "improves overall performance while ensuring low latency by introducing a "
 "multi-level cache structure, reducing mutex contention and optimizing large "
 "object processing flow. Find more "
 "[details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/700/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0068.html)."
 msgstr ""
-"**TCMalloc（线程缓存分配器）**是一种通用内存分配器，通过引入多级缓存结构、减少互斥锁竞争并优化大对象处理流程，在确保低延迟的同时提升整体性能。更多详细信息请参见[此处](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/700/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0068.html)。"
+"**TCMalloc（线程缓存 Malloc）** "
+"是一种通用内存分配器，通过引入多级缓存结构、减少互斥锁竞争并优化大对象处理流程，在保证低延迟的同时提升整体性能。更多[详情](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/700/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0068.html)。"

 msgid ""

 "environment variables."
-msgstr "HCCL 中包含一些由环境变量控制的性能调优功能。"
+msgstr "HCCL 中存在部分性能调优功能，由环境变量控制。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:145
 msgid ""
 "You can configure HCCL to use \"AIV\" mode to optimize performance by "
 "setting the environment variable shown below. In \"AIV\" mode, the "
 "communication is scheduled by AI vector core directly with RoCE, instead of "
 "being scheduled by AI CPU."
 msgstr ""
-"您可以通过设置如下所示的环境变量，将 HCCL 配置为使用 \"AIV\" 模式以优化性能。在 \"AIV\" 模式下，通信由 AI 向量核心直接通过 "
-"RoCE 进行调度，而非由 AI CPU 调度。"
+"您可以通过设置如下环境变量，将 HCCL 配置为使用 \"AIV\" 模式以优化性能。在 \"AIV\" 模式下，通信由 AI 向量核心直接通过 "
+"RoCE 调度，而非由 AI CPU 调度。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:152
 msgid ""
 "Plus, there are more features for performance optimization in specific "
 "scenarios, which are shown below."
-msgstr "此外，在特定场景下还有更多用于性能优化的功能，如下所示。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:154
-msgid ""
-"`HCCL_INTRA_ROCE_ENABLE`: Use RDMA link instead of SDMA link between two 8Ps"
-" as the mesh interconnect link. Find more "
-"[details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0044.html)."
-msgstr ""
-"`HCCL_INTRA_ROCE_ENABLE`：在两个 8P 之间使用 RDMA 链路而非 SDMA "
-"链路作为网状互连链路。更多详细信息请参见[此处](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0044.html)。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:155
-msgid ""
-"`HCCL_RDMA_TC`: Use this var to configure traffic class of RDMA NIC. Find "
-"more "
-"[details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0045.html)."
-msgstr ""
-"`HCCL_RDMA_TC`：使用此变量配置 RDMA NIC "
-"的流量等级。更多详细信息请参见[此处](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0045.html)。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:156
-msgid ""
-"`HCCL_RDMA_SL`: Use this var to configure service level of RDMA NIC. Find "
-"more "
-"[details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0046.html)."
-msgstr ""
-"`HCCL_RDMA_SL`：使用此变量配置 RDMA NIC "
-"的服务级别。更多详细信息请参见[此处](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0046.html)。"
+msgstr "此外，在特定场景下还有更多性能优化功能，如下所示。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:157
 msgid ""
-"`HCCL_BUFFSIZE`: Use this var to control the cache size for sharing data "
-"between two NPUs. Find more "
-"[details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0047.html)."
+"- `HCCL_INTRA_ROCE_ENABLE`: Use RDMA link instead of SDMA link between two 8Ps as the mesh interconnect link. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0044.html).\n"
+"- `HCCL_RDMA_TC`: Use this var to configure traffic class of RDMA NIC. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0045.html).\n"
+"- `HCCL_RDMA_SL`: Use this var to configure service level of RDMA NIC. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0046.html).\n"
+"- `HCCL_BUFFSIZE`: Use this var to control the cache size for sharing data between two NPUs. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0047.html)."
 msgstr ""
-"`HCCL_BUFFSIZE`：使用此变量控制两个 NPU "
-"之间共享数据的缓存大小。更多详细信息请参见[此处](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0047.html)。"
+"- `HCCL_INTRA_ROCE_ENABLE`：使用 RDMA 链路替代两个 8P 之间的 SDMA 链路作为网格互联链路。更多[详情](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0044.html)。\n"
+"- `HCCL_RDMA_TC`：使用此变量配置 RDMA 网卡的流量类别。更多[详情](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0045.html)。\n"
+"- `HCCL_RDMA_SL`：使用此变量配置 RDMA 网卡的服务等级。更多[详情](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0046.html)。\n"
+"- `HCCL_BUFFSIZE`：使用此变量控制两个 NPU 之间共享数据的缓存大小。更多[详情](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0047.html)。"

-msgstr "对于推理工作负载，交换操作可能引入秒级延迟"

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:204
-msgid "Recommended values are `0` or `1`"
-msgstr "推荐值为 `0` 或 `1`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:206
-msgid "4.3 Disable Automatic NUMA Balancing"
-msgstr "4.3禁用自动 NUMA 平衡"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:214
-msgid "Disables the kernel’s automatic NUMA page migration mechanism"
-msgstr "禁用内核的自动 NUMA 页迁移机制"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:218
-msgid "Prevents background memory page migrations"
-msgstr "防止后台内存页迁移"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:219
-msgid "Reduces unpredictable memory access latency"
-msgstr "减少不可预测的内存访问延迟"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:220
-msgid "Improves performance stability on NUMA systems"
-msgstr "提升 NUMA 系统上的性能稳定性"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:222
-msgid "Recommended For"
-msgstr "推荐用于"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:224
-msgid "Multi-socket servers"
-msgstr "多插槽服务器"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:225
-msgid "Ascend / NPU deployments with explicit NUMA binding"
-msgstr "具有显式 NUMA 绑定的 Ascend / NPU 部署"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:226
-msgid "Systems with manually managed CPU and memory affinity"
-msgstr "手动管理 CPU 和内存亲和性的系统"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:228
-msgid "4.4 Increase Scheduler Migration Cost"
-msgstr "4.4增加调度器迁移成本"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:236
-msgid ""
-"Increases the cost for the scheduler to migrate tasks between CPU cores"
-msgstr "增加调度器在 CPU 核心间迁移任务的成本"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:240
-msgid "Reduces frequent thread migration"
-msgstr "减少频繁的线程迁移"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:241
-msgid "Improves CPU cache locality"
-msgstr "提升 CPU 缓存局部性"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:242
-msgid "Lowers latency jitter for inference workloads"
-msgstr "降低推理工作负载的延迟抖动"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:244
-msgid "Parameter Details"
-msgstr "参数详情"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:246
-msgid "Unit: nanoseconds (ns)"
-msgstr "单位：纳秒（ns）"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:247
-msgid "Typical recommended range: 50000–100000"
-msgstr "典型推荐范围：50000–100000"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md:248
-msgid "Higher values encourage threads to stay on the same CPU core"
-msgstr "较高的值有助于线程保持在同一个 CPU 核心上运行"
-
-msgid "# Optimization and Tuning"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "## Preparation"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "!!! note"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "## Optimizations"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "### 1. Memory Allocator Optimization"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "#### 1.1. jemalloc"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "#### 1.2. Tcmalloc"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "### 2. `torch_npu` Optimization"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "### 3. CANN Optimization"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "#### 3.1. HCCL Optimization"
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid ""
-"- `HCCL_INTRA_ROCE_ENABLE`: Use RDMA link instead of SDMA link between two 8Ps as the mesh interconnect link. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0044.html).\n"
-"- `HCCL_RDMA_TC`: Use this var to configure traffic class of RDMA NIC. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0045.html).\n"
-"- `HCCL_RDMA_SL`: Use this var to configure service level of RDMA NIC. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0046.html).\n"
-"- `HCCL_BUFFSIZE`: Use this var to control the cache size for sharing data between two NPUs. Find more [details](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0047.html)."
-msgstr ""
-
-msgid "### 4. Kernel Optimization"
-msgstr ""
-
 msgid ""
 "- Forces all CPU cores to run under the `performance` governor\n"
 "- Disables dynamic frequency scaling (e.g., `ondemand`, `powersave`)"
 msgstr ""
+"- 强制所有 CPU 核心在 `performance` 调节器下运行\n"
+"- 禁用动态频率缩放（例如 `ondemand`、`powersave`）"
+
+msgid "Benefits"
+msgstr "优势"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Keeps CPU cores at maximum frequency\n"
 "- Reduces latency jitter\n"
 "- Improves predictability for inference workloads"
 msgstr ""
+"- 保持 CPU 核心处于最高频率\n"
+"- 减少延迟抖动\n"
+"- 提升推理工作负载的可预测性"
 
 msgid "#### 4.2 Disable Swap Usage"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "#### 4.2 禁用交换空间使用"
+
+msgid "Purpose"
+msgstr "目的"
 
 msgid "- Minimizes the kernel’s tendency to swap memory pages to disk"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "- 最小化内核将内存页交换到磁盘的倾向"
+
+msgid "Benefits"
+msgstr "优势"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Prevents severe latency spikes caused by swapping\n"
 "- Improves stability for large in-memory models"
 msgstr ""
+"- 防止由交换引起的严重延迟尖峰\n"
+"- 提升大型内存模型的稳定性"
+
+msgid "Notes"
+msgstr "说明"
 
 msgid ""
 "- For inference workloads, swap can introduce second-level latency\n"
 "- Recommended values are `0` or `1`"
 msgstr ""
+"- 对于推理工作负载，交换可能引入秒级延迟\n"
+"- 推荐值为 `0` 或 `1`"
 
 msgid "#### 4.3 Disable Automatic NUMA Balancing"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "#### 4.3 禁用自动 NUMA 平衡"
+
+msgid "Purpose"
+msgstr "目的"
 
 msgid "- Disables the kernel’s automatic NUMA page migration mechanism"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "- 禁用内核的自动 NUMA 页面迁移机制"
+
+msgid "Benefits"
+msgstr "优势"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Prevents background memory page migrations\n"
 "- Reduces unpredictable memory access latency\n"
 "- Improves performance stability on NUMA systems"
 msgstr ""
+"- 防止后台内存页面迁移\n"
+"- 减少不可预测的内存访问延迟\n"
+"- 提升 NUMA 系统上的性能稳定性"
+
+msgid "Recommended For"
+msgstr "推荐场景"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Multi-socket servers\n"
 "- Ascend / NPU deployments with explicit NUMA binding\n"
 "- Systems with manually managed CPU and memory affinity"
 msgstr ""
+"- 多插槽服务器\n"
+"- 具有显式 NUMA 绑定的 Ascend / NPU 部署\n"
+"- 手动管理 CPU 和内存亲和性的系统"
 
 msgid "#### 4.4 Increase Scheduler Migration Cost"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "#### 4.4 增加调度器迁移成本"
+
+msgid "Purpose"
+msgstr "目的"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Increases the cost for the scheduler to migrate tasks between CPU cores"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "- 增加调度器在 CPU 核心之间迁移任务的成本"
+
+msgid "Benefits"
+msgstr "优势"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Reduces frequent thread migration\n"
 "- Improves CPU cache locality\n"
 "- Lowers latency jitter for inference workloads"
 msgstr ""
+"- 减少频繁的线程迁移\n"
+"- 提升 CPU 缓存局部性\n"
+"- 降低推理工作负载的延迟抖动"
+
+msgid "Parameter Details"
+msgstr "参数详情"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Unit: nanoseconds (ns)\n"
 "- Typical recommended range: 50000–100000\n"
 "- Higher values encourage threads to stay on the same CPU core"
 msgstr ""

-#~ msgid ""
-#~ "Python supports **LTO** and **PGO** optimization starting from version `3.6`"
-#~ " and above, which can be enabled at compile time. And we have offered "
-#~ "optimized `python` packages directly to users for the sake of convenience. "
-#~ "You can also reproduce the `python` build following this "
-#~ "[tutorial](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0063.html)"
-#~ " according to your specific scenarios."
-#~ msgstr ""
-#~ "Python 从 `3.6` 及以上版本开始支持 **LTO**（链接时优化）和 "
-#~ "**PGO**（基于性能分析的优化），这些优化可在编译时启用。为方便起见，我们已直接为用户提供了优化版的 `python` "
-#~ "软件包。您也可以根据具体场景，按照此[教程](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/Pytorch/600/ptmoddevg/trainingmigrguide/performance_tuning_0063.html)重新构建"
-#~ " `python`。"

+"- 单位：纳秒 (ns)\n"

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:1
-msgid "Service Profiling Guide"
-msgstr "服务性能分析指南"
+msgid "# Service Profiling Guide"
+msgstr "# 服务性能分析指南"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:3
 msgid ""
 "In an inference service process, it is sometimes necessary to monitor the "
 "internal execution flow of the inference service framework to identify "
@@ -32,294 +29,73 @@ msgid ""
 "gathering various types of information, performance bottlenecks can be "
 "quickly located."
 msgstr ""
-"在推理服务过程中，有时需要监控推理服务框架的内部执行流程以识别性能问题。通过采集关键流程的起止时间戳、识别关键函数或迭代、记录关键事件并收集各类信息，可以快速定位性能瓶颈。"
+"在推理服务过程中，有时需要监控推理服务框架的内部执行流程，以识别性能问题。通过收集关键流程的开始和结束时间戳、识别关键函数或迭代、记录关键事件以及收集各类信息，可以快速定位性能瓶颈。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:5
 msgid ""
 "This guide will walk you through the process of collecting performance data "
 "from the vLLM-Ascend service framework and operators. It covers the complete"
 " workflow from preparation, collection, analysis, to visualization, helping "
 "you quickly get started with performance collection tools."
 msgstr ""
 "本指南将引导您完成从 vLLM-Ascend "
-"服务框架及算子中采集性能数据的过程。它涵盖了从准备、采集、分析到可视化的完整工作流程，帮助您快速上手性能采集工具。"
+"服务框架和算子中收集性能数据的过程。它涵盖了从准备、收集、分析到可视化的完整工作流程，帮助您快速上手性能收集工具。"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:7
 msgid ""
 "Two performance collection solutions are provided below: Ascend PyTorch "
 "Profiler and MS Service Profiler. You can choose the appropriate tool for "
 "performance analysis and troubleshooting based on your actual requirements."
 msgstr ""
-"下文提供了两种性能采集解决方案：Ascend PyTorch Profiler 和 MS Service "
+"下面提供两种性能收集方案：Ascend PyTorch Profiler 和 MS Service "
 "Profiler。您可以根据实际需求选择合适的工具进行性能分析和问题排查。"

-msgid ""

-"pytorch-profiler)"
-msgstr "[**模型算子性能** → 使用 Ascend PyTorch Profiler](#ascend-pytorch-profiler)"

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:30
-msgid "0. Installation and Configuration"
-msgstr "0. 安装与配置"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:32
-msgid ""
-"No additional packages need to be installed; it can be enabled through "
-"command-line configuration. Currently, vLLM enables **python stack** by "
-"default, which can significantly inflate the collected performance data. If "
-"you do not wish to collect **python stack**, you can disable it using "
-"`torch_profiler_with_stack=false`."
-msgstr ""
-"无需安装额外包；可通过命令行配置启用。目前，vLLM 默认启用了 **python 调用栈**，这会显著增加采集的性能数据量。如果您不希望采集 "
-"**python 调用栈**，可以使用 `torch_profiler_with_stack=false` 来禁用它。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:34
-msgid "1. Preparation for Collection"
-msgstr "1.采集准备"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:36
-msgid ""
-"Start the online service and set the `--profiler-config` parameter to "
-"control the path for saving performance files. After the parameter is set, "
-"the collection function is enabled."
-msgstr "启动在线服务，并设置 `--profiler-config` 参数来控制性能文件的保存路径。参数设置后，采集功能即被启用。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:51
-msgid ""
-"Note:**January 19, 2026: The vLLM mainline has deprecated the "
-"VLLM_TORCH_PROFILER_DIR environment variable.**[Related "
-"PR](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/pull/5928)  When using the "
-"vLLM Ascend mainline code to collect profiler data, remember to use the "
-"`--profiler-config` (online) parameter or the `profiler_config` (offline) "
-"parameter."
-msgstr ""
-"注意：**2026年1月19日：vLLM 主线已弃用 VLLM_TORCH_PROFILER_DIR 环境变量。**[相关 "
-"PR](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/pull/5928) 使用 vLLM Ascend "
-"主线代码采集性能分析器数据时，请记得使用 `--profiler-config`（在线）参数或 `profiler_config`（离线）参数。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:53
-msgid "2. Start Collection"
-msgstr "2.开始采集"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:55
-msgid ""
-"Performance collection is controlled by sending API requests. You can start "
-"collection after stabilizing the actual business data and collect profiling "
-"for a few seconds before stopping; or you can start collection first, then "
-"send business requests, and finally stop."
-msgstr "性能采集通过发送 API 请求来控制。您可以在实际业务数据稳定后开始采集，采集几秒后停止；或者可以先开始采集，然后发送业务请求，最后停止。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:57
-msgid "Send the following request to start the profiling service:"
-msgstr "发送以下请求以启动性能分析服务："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:63
-msgid "Send the following request to stop the profiling service:"
-msgstr "发送以下请求以停止性能分析服务："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:69
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:157
-msgid "3. Send Requests"
-msgstr "3.发送请求"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:71
-msgid ""
-"Send requests according to your actual business data. After sending the "
-"requests, stop the profiling service, and the data will be automatically "
-"saved to the previously configured path:"
-msgstr "根据您的实际业务数据发送请求。发送请求后，停止性能分析服务，数据将自动保存到先前配置的路径："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:86
-msgid "4. Analyze Data"
-msgstr "4.分析数据"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:88
-msgid ""
-"Navigate to the `./vllm_profile` directory and locate the generated "
-"`*ascend_pt` folder. This folder needs to be analyzed before profiling data "
-"can be examined."
-msgstr "导航到 `./vllm_profile` 目录并找到生成的 `*ascend_pt` 文件夹。在检查性能分析数据之前，需要先分析此文件夹。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:95
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:182
-msgid "5. View Results"
-msgstr "5.查看结果"
+msgid "## Solution Comparison"
+msgstr "## 方案对比"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:97
 msgid ""
-"After analysis, the `*ascend_pt` directory will contain many files, with the"
-" main analysis focus being the `ASCEND_PROFILER_OUTPUT` folder. This "
-"directory will include the following files:"
+"| Feature | Ascend PyTorch Profiler | MS Service Profiler |\n"
+"|:-----|:------------------------|:------------------|\n"
+"| Installation Method | Built-in, no additional installation required | Requires building msserviceprofiler from source |\n"
+"| Collection Granularity | PyTorch operator level | Service framework function level |\n"
+"| Control Method | API request control | Configuration file control |\n"
+"| Applicable Scenarios | Model operator performance analysis | Service framework workflow analysis |\n"
+"| Data Format | ascend_pt format | Chrome Tracing + CSV |\n"
+"| Main Advantage | Operator-level performance analysis | Service framework workflow visualization |\n"
+"| Supported Collection Capabilities | PyTorch operator level | PyTorch operator level and Service framework function level |"
 msgstr ""
-"分析后，`*ascend_pt` 目录将包含许多文件，主要分析重点是 `ASCEND_PROFILER_OUTPUT` 文件夹。此目录将包含以下文件："
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:99
-msgid "`analysis.db`: Performance data in database format"
-msgstr "`analysis.db`：数据库格式的性能数据"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:101
-msgid "`api_statistic.csv`: API call statistics"
-msgstr "`api_statistic.csv`：API 调用统计"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:103
-msgid "`ascend_pytorch_profiler_0.db`: Performance data in database format"
-msgstr "`ascend_pytorch_profiler_0.db`：数据库格式的性能数据"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:105
-msgid "`kernel_details.csv`: Kernel-level related data"
-msgstr "`kernel_details.csv`：内核级相关数据"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:107
-msgid "`operator_details.csv`: Operator-level related data"
-msgstr "`operator_details.csv`：算子级相关数据"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:109
-msgid "`op_statistic.csv`: Operator utilization data"
-msgstr "`op_statistic.csv`：算子利用率数据"
+"| 特性 | Ascend PyTorch Profiler | MS Service Profiler |\n"
+"|:-----|:------------------------|:------------------|\n"
+"| 安装方式 | 内置，无需额外安装 | 需要从源码构建 msserviceprofiler |\n"
+"| 采集粒度 | PyTorch 算子级别 | 服务框架函数级别 |\n"

+"| 适用场景 | 模型算子性能分析 | 服务框架工作流分析 |\n"
+"| 数据格式 | ascend_pt 格式 | Chrome Tracing + CSV |\n"
+"| 主要优势 | 算子级性能分析 | 服务框架工作流可视化 |\n"
+"| 支持的采集能力 | PyTorch 算子级别 | PyTorch 算子级别和服务框架函数级别 |"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:111

+msgstr "## 快速选择指南"
 
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:113
 msgid ""

-

-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "Parameter"
-msgstr "参数"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "Description"
-msgstr "说明"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "Required"
-msgstr "是否必选"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "enable"
-msgstr "enable"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "Switch for profiling: <br />0: disable<br />1: enable<br />Default: 0"
-msgstr "性能分析开关：<br />0：禁用<br />1：启用<br />默认值：0"
-

-msgstr "prof_dir"

-msgid ""
-"Directory to store collected performance data. <br />Default: "
-"`${HOME}/.ms_server_profiler`"
-msgstr "性能数据存储目录。<br />默认值：`${HOME}/.ms_server_profiler`"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "No"
-msgstr "否"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "profiler_level"
-msgstr "profiler_level"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "Data collection level. Default is \"INFO\" (normal level)."
-msgstr "数据采集等级。默认值为 \"INFO\"（普通级别）。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "acl_task_time"
-msgstr "acl_task_time"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Switch to collect operator dispatch latency and execution latency. Values: "
-"<br />0: off. Default; 0 or any invalid value means off.<br />1: on. When "
-"enabled, calls `aclprofCreateConfig` with `ACL_PROF_TASK_TIME_L0`.<br />2: "
-"on. MSPTI-based dump. When enabled, set before starting the service: `export"
-" LD_PRELOAD={INSTALL_DIR}/lib64/libmspti.so`, where `{INSTALL_DIR}` is the "
-"CANN installation root (e.g. `/usr/local/Ascend/cann` for a typical root "
-"install).<br />3: on. Torch Profiler–based dump."
-msgstr ""
-"采集算子下发延迟和执行延迟的开关：<br />0：禁用（默认值；0 或无效值表示禁用）。<br />1：启用；使用 "
-"`ACL_PROF_TASK_TIME_L0` 参数调用 `aclprofCreateConfig`。<br />2：启用基于 MSPTI "
-"的数据落盘；使用 MSPTI 进行性能分析，需要在启动服务前设置：`export "
-"LD_PRELOAD={INSTALL_DIR}/lib64/libmspti.so`，其中 `{INSTALL_DIR}` 为 CANN "
-"安装根目录（例如，典型根目录安装为 `/usr/local/Ascend/cann`）。<br />3：启用基于 Torch Profiler "
-"的数据落盘。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "acl_prof_task_time_level"
-msgstr "acl_prof_task_time_level"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Profiling level and duration. Values: <br />L0: collect operator dispatch "
-"and execution latency only; lower overhead (no operator basic info).<br "
-"/>L1: collect AscendCL interface performance (host–device and inter-device "
-"sync/async memory copy latencies), plus operator dispatch, execution, and "
-"basic info for comprehensive analysis.<br />`{time}`: optional duration "
-"segment; integer 1–999, unit seconds.<br />If unset, defaults to L0 until "
-"program exit; invalid values fall back to defaults.<br />Level and duration "
-"can be combined, e.g., `\"acl_prof_task_time_level\": \"L1;10\"`.<br "
-"/>**Note:** When Torch Profiler is used (`acl_task_time` set to `3`), "
-"`{time}` duration is not supported."
-msgstr ""
-"性能分析的级别和时长：<br />L0：仅采集算子下发和执行延迟；开销较低（不采集算子基本信息）。<br />L1：采集 AscendCL "
-"接口性能（主机-设备和设备间同步/异步内存复制延迟），以及算子下发、执行和基本信息，用于全面分析。<br />`{time}`：可选时长段；整数 "
-"1–999，单位：秒。<br />如未设置，默认为 L0 直到程序退出；无效值将回退到默认值。<br />级别和时长可以组合，例如 "
-"`\"acl_prof_task_time_level\": \"L1;10\"`。<br />**注意：** 当使用 Torch "
-"Profiler（`acl_task_time` 设置为 `3`）时，不支持 `{time}` 时长设置。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "timelimit"
-msgstr "timelimit"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Profiling duration for the service. The process stops automatically after "
-"this time. Range: integer 0–7200, unit: seconds. Default 0 means unlimited. "
-"Recommend at least 120 s; shorter runs may lack data for parsed outputs and "
-"trigger warnings."
-msgstr ""
-"服务性能分析时长。进程将在此时长后自动停止。范围：整数 0–7200，单位：秒。默认值 0 表示无限制。建议至少 120 "
-"秒；运行时间过短可能导致解析输出数据不足并触发警告。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "domain"
-msgstr "domain"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Limit profiling to the specified domains to reduce data volume. String, "
-"separated by semicolons, case-sensitive, e.g., \"Request; KVCache\".<br "
-"/>Empty means all available domains.<br />Available domains: Request, "
-"KVCache, ModelExecute, BatchSchedule, Communication.<br />Note: If the "
-"selected domains are incomplete, analysis output may show warnings due to "
-"missing data. See [Reference Table "
-"1](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/canncommercial/850/devaids/Profiling/mindieprofiling_0010.html)."
-msgstr ""
-"限制性能分析到指定的域以减少数据量。字符串类型，以分号分隔，区分大小写，例如：\"Request; KVCache\"。<br "
-"/>为空表示所有可用域。<br "
-"/>可用域包括：Request、KVCache、ModelExecute、BatchSchedule、Communication。<br "
-"/>注意：如果选择的域不完整，由于数据缺失，分析输出可能会显示警告。参见[参考表 "
-"1](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/canncommercial/850/devaids/Profiling/mindieprofiling_0010.html)。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "torch_prof_stack"
-msgstr "torch_prof_stack"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Collect operator call stacks (framework and CPU operators). Values: `false` "
-"(default, off), `true` (on). Requires `acl_task_time` set to `3`. **Note:** "
-"Enabling this configuration introduces additional performance overhead."
-msgstr ""
-"采集算子调用栈（框架和 CPU 算子）。取值：`false`（默认，关闭），`true`（开启）。要求 `acl_task_time` 设置为 "
-"`3`。**注意：** 启用此配置会引入额外的性能开销。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "torch_prof_step_num"
-msgstr "torch_prof_step_num"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Torch Profiler step limit. Integer ≥ 0. Default `0` means collect all "
-"steps.<br />Requires `acl_task_time` set to `3`."
-msgstr ""
-"Torch Profiler 步数限制。整数 ≥ 0。默认值 `0` 表示采集所有步数。<br />要求 `acl_task_time` 设置为 "
-"`3`。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid "profiler_step_num"
-msgstr "profiler_step_num"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md
-msgid ""
-"Step limit for operator and service framework profiling. Integer ≥ 0.<br "
-"/>`0` or invalid values stop the entire service profiling process.<br />The "
-"number of steps actually recorded depends on `modelRunnerExec` events."
-msgstr ""
-"算子及服务框架性能分析的步数限制。整数 ≥ 0。<br />`0` 或无效值将停止整个服务性能分析进程。<br />实际记录的步数取决于 "
-"`modelRunnerExec` 事件。"
-
-#: ../../source/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.md:219
-msgid "Example Configuration"
-msgstr "配置示例"

 msgid "#### 6.1 Profiling Configuration File"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "#### 6.1 性能分析配置文件"
+
+msgid ""
+"The profiling configuration file controls profiling parameters and behavior."
+msgstr "性能分析配置文件控制性能分析参数和行为。"
 
 msgid "##### File Format"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 文件格式"
+
+msgid "The configuration is in JSON format. Main parameters:"
+msgstr "配置采用 JSON 格式。主要参数："
 
 msgid ""
 "| Parameter | Description | Required |\n"
@@ -914,30 +202,60 @@ msgid ""
 "| torch_prof_step_num | Torch Profiler step limit. Integer ≥ 0. Default `0` means collect all steps.<br />Requires `acl_task_time` set to `3`. | No |\n"
 "| profiler_step_num | Step limit for operator and service framework profiling. Integer ≥ 0.<br />`0` or invalid values stop the entire service profiling process.<br />The number of steps actually recorded depends on `modelRunnerExec` events. | No |"
 msgstr ""
+"| 参数 | 描述 | 是否必填 |\n"
+"|:------:|:------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|:-----:|\n"
+"| enable | 性能分析开关：<br />0：关闭<br />1：开启<br />默认值：0 | 是 |\n"
+"| prof_dir | 存储收集到的性能数据的目录。<br />默认值：`${HOME}/.ms_server_profiler` | 否 |\n"
+"| profiler_level | 数据收集级别。默认值为\"INFO\"（普通级别）。 | 否 |\n"
+"| acl_task_time | 收集算子调度延迟和执行延迟的开关。取值：<br />0：关闭。默认值；0或任何无效值表示关闭。<br />1：开启。启用时，使用`ACL_PROF_TASK_TIME_L0`调用`aclprofCreateConfig`。<br />2：开启。基于MSPTI的转储。启用时，在启动服务前设置：`export LD_PRELOAD={INSTALL_DIR}/lib64/libmspti.so`，其中`{INSTALL_DIR}`是CANN安装根目录（例如典型根安装的`/usr/local/Ascend/cann`）。<br />3：开启。基于Torch Profiler的转储。 | 否 |\n"
+"| acl_prof_task_time_level | 性能分析级别和持续时间。取值：<br />L0：仅收集算子调度和执行延迟；开销较低（无算子基本信息）。<br />L1：收集AscendCL接口性能（主机-设备和设备间同步/异步内存拷贝延迟），以及算子调度、执行和基本信息，用于全面分析。<br />`{time}`：可选的持续时间段；整数1–999，单位秒。<br />如果未设置，默认使用L0直到程序退出；无效值回退到默认值。<br />级别和持续时间可以组合，例如`\"acl_prof_task_time_level\": \"L1;10\"`。<br />**注意：** 使用Torch Profiler时（`acl_task_time`设置为`3`），不支持`{time}`持续时间。 | 否 |\n"
+"| timelimit | 服务的性能分析持续时间。进程在此时间后自动停止。范围：整数0–7200，单位：秒。默认值0表示无限制。建议至少120秒；运行时间过短可能导致解析输出数据不足并触发警告。 | 否 |\n"
+"| domain | 将性能分析限制在指定域以减少数据量。字符串，分号分隔，区分大小写，例如\"Request; KVCache\"。<br />空字符串表示所有可用域。<br />可用域：Request, KVCache, ModelExecute, BatchSchedule, Communication。<br />注意：如果选择的域不完整，分析输出可能因缺少数据而显示警告。请参见[参考表1](https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/canncommercial/850/devaids/Profiling/mindieprofiling_0010.html)。 | 否 |\n"
+"| torch_prof_stack | 收集算子调用栈（框架和CPU算子）。取值：`false`（默认，关闭），`true`（开启）。需要`acl_task_time`设置为`3`。**注意：** 启用此配置会引入额外的性能开销。 | 否 |\n"
+"| torch_prof_step_num | Torch Profiler步数限制。整数 ≥ 0。默认`0`表示收集所有步数。<br />需要`acl_task_time`设置为`3`。 | 否 |\n"
+"| profiler_step_num | 算子和服务框架性能分析的步数限制。整数 ≥ 0。<br />`0`或无效值会停止整个服务性能分析过程。<br />实际记录的步数取决于`modelRunnerExec`事件。 | 否 |"

-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 配置示例"
 
 msgid "(symbols-configuration-file)="
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "(symbols-configuration-file)="
 
 msgid "#### 6.2 Symbols Configuration File"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "#### 6.2 符号配置文件"
+
+msgid ""
+"The symbols configuration file defines which functions/methods to profile "
+"and supports flexible configuration with custom attribute collection."
+msgstr "符号配置文件定义了要分析哪些函数/方法，并支持通过自定义属性收集进行灵活配置。"
 
 msgid "##### File Name and Loading"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 文件名与加载"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Default load "
 "path:`~/.config/vllm_ascend/service_profiling_symbols.MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.yaml`("
 " According to the installed version of vllm )"
 msgstr ""
+"- "
+"默认加载路径：`~/.config/vllm_ascend/service_profiling_symbols.MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.yaml`（根据已安装的vllm版本）"
+
+msgid ""
+"If you need to customize the profiling points, it is highly recommended to "
+"copy a symbol configuration file to your working directory and point to it "
+"with the `PROFILING_SYMBOLS_PATH` environment variable."
+msgstr "如果需要自定义分析点，强烈建议将符号配置文件复制到工作目录，并通过`PROFILING_SYMBOLS_PATH`环境变量指向该文件。"
 
 msgid "##### Configuration file updates"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 配置文件更新"
+
+msgid ""
+"After you change profiling symbols, restart the vLLM service so the updated "
+"configuration file is loaded."
+msgstr "更改分析符号后，请重启vLLM服务以加载更新后的配置文件。"
 
 msgid "##### Field Descriptions"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 字段说明"
 
 msgid ""
 "| Field | Description | Example |\n"
@@ -950,56 +268,92 @@ msgid ""
 "| max_version | Maximum supported vLLM version | `\"0.11.0\"` |\n"
 "| attributes | Custom attribute collection | Only supported for `\"timer\"` handler. See the section below |"
 msgstr ""
+"| 字段 | 描述 | 示例 |\n"
+"|:-----:|:-----|:-----|\n"
+"| symbol | Python导入路径 + 属性链 | `\"vllm.v1.core.kv_cache_manager:KVCacheManager.free\"` |\n"
+"| handler | 处理器类型 | `\"timer\"`（默认）或 `\"pkg.mod:func\"`（自定义） |\n"
+"| domain | 域标签 | `\"KVCache\"`, `\"ModelExecute\"` |\n"
+"| name | 事件名称 | `\"EngineCoreExecute\"` |\n"
+"| min_version | 支持的最低vLLM版本 | `\"0.9.1\"` |\n"
+"| max_version | 支持的最高vLLM版本 | `\"0.11.0\"` |\n"
+"| attributes | 自定义属性收集 | 仅支持`\"timer\"`处理器。请参见下文 |"

 msgid "##### Custom Attribute Collection"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 自定义属性收集"
+
+msgid ""
+"The `attributes` field supports flexible custom attribute collection and "
+"allows operations and transformations on function arguments and return "
+"values."
+msgstr "`attributes`字段支持灵活的自定义属性收集，并允许对函数参数和返回值进行操作和转换。"
 
 msgid "###### Basic Syntax"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "###### 基本语法"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Argument access: use the parameter name directly, e.g., `input_ids`\n"
 "- Return value access: use the `return` keyword\n"
 "- Pipeline operations: use `|` to chain multiple operations\n"
 "- Attribute access: use `attr` to access object attributes"
 msgstr ""
+"- 参数访问：直接使用参数名，例如 `input_ids`\n"
+"- 返回值访问：使用 `return` 关键字\n"
+"- 管道操作：使用 `|` 链接多个操作\n"
+"- 属性访问：使用 `attr` 访问对象属性"
 
 msgid "###### Example"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "###### 示例"
 
 msgid "###### Expression Notes"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "###### 表达式说明"
 
 msgid ""
 "1. `len(input_ids)`: get the length of parameter `input_ids`.\n"
 "2. `len(return) | str`: get the length of the return value and convert to string (equivalent to `str(len(return))`).\n"
 "3. `return[0] | attr input_ids | len`: get the length of the `input_ids` attribute of the first element in the return value."
 msgstr ""
+"1. `len(input_ids)`：获取参数 `input_ids` 的长度。\n"
+"2. `len(return) | str`：获取返回值的长度并转换为字符串（相当于 `str(len(return))`）。\n"
+"3. `return[0] | attr input_ids | len`：获取返回值中第一个元素的 `input_ids` 属性的长度。"
 
 msgid "###### Supported Expression Types"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "###### 支持的表达式类型"
 
 msgid ""
 "- Basic operations: `len()`, `str()`, `int()`, `float()`\n"
 "- Index access: `return[0]`, `return['key']`\n"
 "- Attribute access: `return | attr attr_name`\n"
 "- Pipeline composition: chain operations with `|`"
 msgstr ""
+"- 基本操作：`len()`、`str()`、`int()`、`float()`\n"
+"- 索引访问：`return[0]`、`return['key']`\n"
+"- 属性访问：`return | attr attr_name`\n"
+"- 管道组合：使用 `|` 链式操作"
 
 msgid "###### Advanced Examples"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "###### 高级示例"
 
 msgid "##### Custom Handler"
-msgstr ""
+msgstr "##### 自定义处理器"
+
+msgid ""
+"When `handler` specifies a custom function, it must match the following "
+"signature:"
+msgstr "当 `handler` 指定自定义函数时，必须符合以下签名："
+
+msgid ""
+"If the custom handler fails to import, the system will automatically fall "
+"back to the default timer mode."
+msgstr "如果自定义处理器导入失败，系统将自动回退到默认的计时器模式。"

-#: ../../source/getting_started.md:14
-msgid "What is vLLM Ascend?"
-msgstr "什么是 vLLM Ascend？"
-
-#: ../../source/getting_started.md:16
-msgid ""
-"vLLM Ascend plugin (vllm-ascend) is a community-maintained hardware plugin "
-"for running vLLM on the Ascend NPU. It provides a hardware-pluggable "
-"interface that decouples the integration of the Ascend NPU with vLLM, "
-"enabling popular open-source models to run seamlessly on Ascend hardware."
-msgstr ""
-"vLLM Ascend 插件（vllm-ascend）是一个由社区维护的硬件插件，用于在 Ascend NPU 上运行 "
-"vLLM。它提供了一个硬件可插拔接口，将 Ascend NPU 与 vLLM 的集成解耦，使流行的开源模型能够在 Ascend 硬件上无缝运行。"
-

 msgid "## What is vLLM Ascend?"
+msgstr "## 什么是 vLLM Ascend？"
+
+msgid ""
+"vLLM Ascend plugin (vllm-ascend) is a community-maintained hardware plugin "
+"for running vLLM on the Ascend NPU. It provides a hardware-pluggable "
+"interface that decouples the integration of the Ascend NPU with vLLM, "
+"enabling popular open-source models to run seamlessly on Ascend hardware."
 msgstr ""
+"vLLM Ascend 插件（vllm-ascend）是一个由社区维护的硬件插件，用于在昇腾 NPU 上运行 vLLM。它提供了硬件可插拔接口，将昇腾 "
+"NPU 与 vLLM 的集成解耦，使得流行的开源模型能够在昇腾硬件上无缝运行。"

-msgid ""
-"**Using pip**: first prepare the environment manually or via a CANN image, "
-"then install `vllm-ascend` using pip."

+"- **使用 pip**：先手动或通过 CANN 镜像准备环境，然后使用 pip 安装 `vllm-ascend`。\n"
+"- **使用 Docker**：直接使用 `vllm-ascend` 预构建的 Docker 镜像。"

-msgstr "如果您通过 `uv` 安装，请确保在所有其他包安装完成**之后**再安装 `triton-ascend`，以避免依赖解析冲突。"
+msgstr "如果通过 `uv` 安装，请确保在所有其他包安装完成**之后**再安装 `triton-ascend`，以避免依赖解析冲突。"
 
-#: ../../source/installation.md:229
 msgid ""
 "If you are building custom operators for Atlas A3, you should run `git "
 "submodule update --init --recursive` manually, or ensure your environment "
 "has internet access."
 msgstr ""
-"如果您正在为 Atlas A3 构建自定义算子，请手动执行 `git submodule update --init "
-"--recursive`，或确保您的环境可以访问互联网。"
-
-#: ../../source/installation.md:233
-msgid ""
-"To build custom operators, gcc/g++ higher than 8 and C++17 or higher are "
-"required. If you are using `pip install -e .` and encounter a torch-npu "
-"version conflict, please install with `pip install --no-build-isolation -e "
-".` to build on system env. If you encounter other problems during compiling,"
-" it is probably because an unexpected compiler is being used, you may export"
-" `CXX_COMPILER` and `C_COMPILER` in the environment to specify your g++ and "
-"gcc locations before compiling."
+"如果为 Atlas A3 构建自定义算子，应手动运行 `git submodule update --init "
+"--recursive`，或确保环境可以访问互联网。"
+
+msgid ""
+"To build custom operators, gcc/g++ higher than 8 and C++17 or higher are required. If you are using `pip install -e .` and encounter a torch-npu version conflict, please install with `pip install --no-build-isolation -e .` to build on system env.\n"
+"    If you encounter other problems during compiling, it is probably because an unexpected compiler is being used, you may export `CXX_COMPILER` and `C_COMPILER` in the environment to specify your g++ and gcc locations before compiling."
 msgstr ""
-"构建自定义算子需要 gcc/g++ 版本高于 8 且支持 C++17 或更高标准。如果您在使用 `pip install -e .` 时遇到 "
-"torch-npu 版本冲突，请使用 `pip install --no-build-isolation -e .` "
-"以在系统环境下构建。如果在编译过程中遇到其他问题，通常是因为使用了非预期的编译器，您可以在编译前导出 `CXX_COMPILER` 和 "
-"`C_COMPILER` 环境变量来指定 g++ 和 gcc 的具体路径。"
+"构建自定义算子需要 gcc/g++ 版本高于 8 且支持 C++17 或更高版本。如果使用 `pip install -e .` 时遇到 torch-npu 版本冲突，请使用 `pip install --no-build-isolation -e .` 在系统环境中构建。\n"
+"    如果在编译过程中遇到其他问题，可能是因为使用了非预期的编译器，您可以在编译前在环境中导出 `CXX_COMPILER` 和 `C_COMPILER` 来指定 g++ 和 gcc 的位置。"
 
-#: ../../source/installation.md:236
 msgid ""
 "If you are building in a CPU-only environment where `npu-smi` is "
 "unavailable, you need to set `SOC_VERSION` before `pip install -e .` so the "
 "build can target the correct chip. You can refer to `Dockerfile*` defaults, "
 "for example:"
 msgstr ""
-"如果您在仅 CPU 的环境（无法使用 `npu-smi`）中构建，需要在执行 `pip install -e .` 之前设置 "
-"`SOC_VERSION`，以便构建过程针对正确的芯片。您可以参考 `Dockerfile*` 中的默认值，例如："
-
-#: ../../source/installation.md:238
-msgid "Atlas A2: `export SOC_VERSION=ascend910b1`"
-msgstr "Atlas A2：`export SOC_VERSION=ascend910b1`"
-
-#: ../../source/installation.md:239
-msgid "Atlas A3: `export SOC_VERSION=ascend910_9391`"
-msgstr "Atlas A3：`export SOC_VERSION=ascend910_9391`"
+"如果在无法使用 `npu-smi` 的纯 CPU 环境中构建，需要在 `pip install -e .` 之前设置 "
+"`SOC_VERSION`，以便构建过程定位正确的芯片。您可以参考 `Dockerfile*` 中的默认值，例如："
 
-#: ../../source/installation.md:240

-msgstr "Atlas 300I：`export SOC_VERSION=ascend310p1`"
-
-#: ../../source/installation.md:241

-"Ascend 950 Products: `export SOC_VERSION=<value starting with "

-msgstr "Ascend 950 系列产品：`export SOC_VERSION=<以 \"ascend950\" 开头的值>`"
+"- Atlas A2: `export SOC_VERSION=ascend910b1`\n"
+"    - Atlas A3: `export SOC_VERSION=ascend910_9391`\n"
+"    - Atlas 300I: `export SOC_VERSION=ascend310p1`\n"
+"    - Ascend 950 Products: `export SOC_VERSION=<value starting with \"ascend950\">`"

+"    - Atlas 300I：`export SOC_VERSION=ascend310p1`\n"
